sentences.target: Wir gehen heute oder morgen ins Kino.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈɡeːən ˈhɔɪ̯tə ˈoːdɐ ˈmɔʁɡən ɪns ˈkiːno/

translations.de: Wir gehen heute oder morgen ins Kino.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈɡeːən ˈhɔɪ̯tə ˈoːdɐ ˈmɔʁɡən ɪns ˈkiːno/
translations.en: We go to the movies today or tomorrow.
translations.es: Vamos al cine hoy o mañana.
translations.fr: On va au cinéma aujourd’hui ou demain.
translations.it: Andiamo al cinema oggi o domani.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天或者明天去看电影。
translations.yue: 我哋今日或者聽日去睇戲。
translations.ru: Мы пойдём в кино сегодня или завтра.
translations.pt: Vamos ao cinema hoje ou amanhã.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים לקולנוע היום או מחר.
translations.tr: Bugün ya da yarın sinemaya gidiyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng ta đi xem phim hôm nay hoặc ngày mai.
translations.ar: سنذهب إلى السينما اليوم أو غدًا.
translations.nl: We gaan vandaag of morgen naar de bioscoop.
translations.uk: Ми підемо в кіно сьогодні або завтра.
translations.hi: हम आज या कल फ़िल्म देखने जाएंगे.
translations.pl: Idziemy do kina dziś albo jutro.
translations.el: Πάμε στο σινεμά σήμερα ή αύριο.
translations.nb: Vi går på kino i dag eller i morgen.
translations.id: Kita pergi ke bioskop hari ini atau besok.
translations.sv: Vi går på bio i dag eller i morgon.
translations.ro: Mergem la cinema azi sau mâine.
translations.cs: Půjdeme dnes nebo zítra do kina.
translations.da: Vi går i biografen i dag eller i morgen.
translations.ja: 今日か明日映画を見に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative (1st plural), expressing motion.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; one of two alternative time adjuncts.
Coordinating conjunction linking two adverbial alternatives ('heute' vs. 'morgen').
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; alternative to 'heute'.
Contracted preposition ('in' + definite article 'das'); selects accusative, marking direction.
Common noun, neuter singular; object of the preposition 'ins' (destination).

sentences.target: Du kannst Wasser oder Saft haben.

translations.de: Du kannst Wasser oder Saft haben.
translations.en: You can have water or juice.
translations.fr: Tu peux prendre de l’eau ou du jus.
translations.pt: Você pode tomar água ou suco.
translations.he: אתה יכול לשתות מים או מיץ.
translations.tr: Su ya da meyve suyu içebilirsin.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể uống nước hoặc nước trái cây.
translations.nl: Je kunt water of sap drinken.
translations.uk: Ти можеш пити воду або сік.
translations.hi: तुम पानी या जूस पी सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να πιεις νερό ή χυμό.
translations.nb: Du kan få vann eller juice.
translations.id: Kamu bisa minum air atau jus.
translations.sv: Du kan få vatten eller juice.
translations.ro: Poți să bei apă sau suc.
translations.cs: Můžeš si dát vodu nebo džus.
translations.da: Du kan få vand eller juice.
translations.ja: 水かジュースをどうぞ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative (2nd singular); licenses bare infinitive 'haben' and expresses ability/permission.
Common noun, neuter (mass); direct object of 'haben'; first element in a coordination.
Coordinating conjunction linking two alternative direct objects ('Wasser' vs. 'Saft').
Common noun, masculine singular (mass/count); direct object of 'haben'; second element in the coordination.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'kannst' (modal + infinitive construction).

sentences.target: Ich koche heute Reis oder Nudeln.

translations.de: Ich koche heute Reis oder Nudeln.
translations.en: I’m cooking rice or noodles today.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui je cuisine du riz ou des pâtes.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天做米饭或者面条。
translations.ru: Сегодня я готовлю рис или макароны.
translations.pt: Hoje eu cozinho arroz ou macarrão.
translations.he: היום אני מבשל אורז או פסטה.
translations.tr: Bugün pilav ya da makarna yapıyorum.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi nấu cơm hoặc mì.
translations.nl: Vandaag kook ik rijst of pasta.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я готую рис або макарони.
translations.hi: आज मैं चावल या नूडल्स बना रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: I dag lager jeg ris eller pasta.
translations.id: Hari ini saya memasak nasi atau mi.
translations.sv: I dag lagar jag ris eller pasta.
translations.da: I dag laver jeg ris eller pasta.
translations.ja: 今日はご飯かパスタを作ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative (1st singular); denotes the cooking action.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Common noun, masculine (mass); direct object of 'koche'; first element in a coordination.
Coordinating conjunction linking two alternative direct objects ('Reis' vs. 'Nudeln').
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'koche'; second element in the coordination.

sentences.target: Er arbeitet hier oder zu Hause.

translations.de: Er arbeitet hier oder zu Hause.
translations.en: He works here or at home.
translations.es: Él trabaja aquí o en casa.
translations.fr: Il travaille ici ou à la maison.
translations.it: Lui lavora qui o a casa.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在这里或者在家工作。
translations.yue: 佢喺呢度或者喺屋企做嘢。
translations.pt: Ele trabalha aqui ou em casa.
translations.tr: O burada ya da evde çalışıyor.
translations.vi: Anh ấy làm việc ở đây hoặc ở nhà.
translations.ar: هو يعمل هنا أو في البيت.
translations.hi: वह यहाँ या घर पर काम करता है.
translations.pl: On pracuje tutaj albo w domu.
translations.el: Αυτός δουλεύει εδώ ή στο σπίτι.
translations.id: Dia bekerja di sini atau di rumah.
translations.ja: 彼はここか家で働きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative (3rd singular); denotes ongoing work.
Locative adverb; one of two alternative place adjuncts.
Coordinating conjunction linking two locative adverbials ('hier' vs. 'zu Hause').
Preposition selecting dative; forms a fixed locative expression with 'Hause' ('zu Hause' = at home).
Common noun, dative singular form used in the fixed phrase 'zu Hause'; functions as a locative complement.

Er arbeitet hier oder zu Hause.

en: We go to the movies today or tomorrow.
You can have water or juice.
I’m cooking rice or noodles today.
He works here or at home.

Él trabaja aquí o en casa.

Aujourd’hui je cuisine du riz ou des pâtes.

Su ya da meyve suyu içebilirsin.
Bugün pilav ya da makarna yapıyorum.

Kamu bisa minum air atau jus.
